column1: # Custom partition table for the ESP32-C6-LCD-1.47 (4 MB flash
# Why custom (not the stock single/dual-OTA tables):
#   * The Zigbee/ZBOSS stack needs its own dedicated NVS-like partitions
#     ("zb_storage" + "zb_fct") — see the esp-zigbee-sdk examples' partitions.csv.
#   * 4 MB is tight once ZBOSS + LVGL + the ST7789 driver are linked
#     SINGLE app image with NO OTA (frees ~1.5 MB vs a dual-OTA layout). The board
#     is flashed from the browser installer
column2: so field OTA is not required.

column1: # Layout (offsets are auto-computed from sizes; first usable offset is 0x9000
# right after the 0x8000 partition table sector):
# Name        Type  SubType   Offset    Size     Notes
# Sizes must stay 4 KB-aligned (0x1000). App is 0x10000-aligned by the bootloader.
nvs
phy_init
# Factory app: ~3 MB. Comfortably holds ZBOSS lib + LVGL 9 + ST7789 + app.
factory
# Zigbee persistent network data (keys
# the esp-zigbee 2.x datasets layer via nvs_open_from_partition("zb_storage"
# — so the subtype MUST be `nvs` (the 1.x-era examples' `fat` subtype makes that
# lookup fail and esp_zb_init abort()s in ezb_plat_datasets_init; found on real
# hardware 2026-07-10
zb_storage
# Zigbee factory/production data partition used by the SDK. Keep "zb_fct" exactly.
zb_fct
